1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Listeforslagsportalen for valet i 2027 er no opna</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)

MINOR

Link text is very long (213 characters)

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valgene-i-norge/">Vala i Noreg</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"> <a c
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.stortinget.no/no/Stortinget-og-demokratiet/Valg-og-konstituering/Fullmaktskomiteen/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">valt ein fullmaktskomité</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valggjennomforing/">Valgjennomføring</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Valgresultater</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Kontakt oss - Valgdirektoratet

https://www.valgdirektoratet.no/annet/kontakt-oss/
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 84

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article vd-is-hidden"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/annet/kontakt-oss/">Kontakt oss</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> </ul> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valggjennomforing/">Valgjennomføring</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Krav og frister - Valgdirektoratet

https://www.valgdirektoratet.no/om-valg/listeforslag/krav-og-frister/

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://lovdata.no/lov/2023-06-16-62/§3-1" rel="noopener" target="_blank">valglovens kapittel 3</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://listeforslag.valg.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">listeforslagsportalen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/">Stortingsvalget 2025</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/">Stortingsvalget 2025</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2006-05-19-16" target="_blank">Offentlighetsloven</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1967-02-10" target="_blank">Forvaltningsloven</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://einnsyn.no/sok" target="_blank">Søk i OEP</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valgdirektoratet/om-valgdirektoratet/">Om Valgdirektoratet</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sid
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

<svg role="img" title="facebook"> <use xlink:href="/Assets/Icons/symbol/icons.svg#facebook"></use> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valgene-i-norge/">Vala i Noreg</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"> <a c
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-list vd-list--type-nav"> <h3 class="vd-list__title">Les mer</h3> <ul class="vd-list__body"> <li class="vd-list__item"> <a class="vd-list__element vd-btn vd-btn--skin-primary vd-btn--siz
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Stemme på institusjon - Valgdirektoratet

https://www.valgdirektoratet.no/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/stemme-pa-institusjon/

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/for-velgere/stortingsvalget-2025/">Stortingsvalget 2025</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="vd-list__title"> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valgdata/">Valgdata</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"> <a class="vd-si
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Mål og samfunnsoppdrag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a class="vd-card vd-card--size-puffy vd-card--type-linked vd-card--theme-purple" href="/om-valgdirektoratet/om-valgdirektoratet/mal-og-samfunnsoppdrag/" title="Mål og samfunnsoppdrag"> <div class="vd
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (111 characters)

<a class="vd-card vd-card--size-puffy vd-card--type-linked vd-card--theme-purple" href="/om-valgdirektoratet/om-valgdirektoratet/postjournal/" title="Postjournal"> <div class="vd-card__icon vd-icon-wr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-card__header">Søke om tilskudd</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)

MINOR

<svg role="img" title="facebook"> <use xlink:href="/Assets/Icons/symbol/icons.svg#facebook"></use> </svg>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="vd-list__title"> Forhåndsstemmer </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-header__sites vd-header__menu" id="header-mobile-menu"> <!-- mobile only lang select --> <div class="vd-header__item vd-visible-small vd-header__item--special"> <button class="vd-header
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="vd-sidenav vd-sidenav--type-article"> <a class="vd-sidenav__header" href="/om-valg/valgdata/">Valgdata</a> <ul class="vd-sidenav__list"> <li class="vd-sidenav__list__item"> <a class="vd-si
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="vd-sharebar__btn vd-sharebar--type-facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/valginorge/" target="_blank" title="Valg i Norge på Facebook"> <i class="vd-sharebar__image vd-icon vd-svgicon" ti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

https://www.valgdirektoratet.no/en/
